title: cerastium fontanum var. tibeticum
intro: Cerastium fontanum var. tibeticum, also known as Tibetan mouse ear, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cerastium fontanum var. tibeticum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
